# LLMCosts.dev — Deepcogito Models Pricing
> Source: LLMCosts.dev — https://llmcosts.dev
> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [Deep Cogito: Cogito v2.1 671B](https://llmcosts.dev/models/cogito-v2.1-671b) | Deepcogito | $1.25 | $1.25 | $None | 128,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
